issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: self-host-activepieces-docker-compose
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B omits required variables, port mapping, and volume naming.

scenarios.name: create-order-processing-code-step
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B deviates in naming, type, and output structure.

scenarios.name: build-custom-piece-my-app
scenarios.rationale: Response B uses createPiece (though not PieceAuth.SecretText) whereas Response A uses registerPiece, so B covers more rubric items.
